title: Extreme Job
tmdbOverview: A drug squad attempts to take down a criminal organization and they must go undercover to do so, so they begin working at a chicken restaurant, that becomes famous for its delicious chicken. Due to the unexpected popularity, the detectives find themselves in a situation they never expected.
synopsis: Extreme Job is a 2019 action, comedy and crime film from South Korea. It holds a solid 7.1 rating on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a 12 certification (DE rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
